description: Synthetic event contract for a public-safe telemetry signal.

source_of_truth_boundary.boundary_note: Derived context may support review, but it is not the authoritative system record.

required_fields.name: event_id
required_fields.description: Synthetic unique identifier for the event.

required_fields.name: observed_at
required_fields.description: Timestamp for when the synthetic signal was observed.

required_fields.name: signal_summary
required_fields.description: Public-safe summary of the structured signal.

review_requirements: Confirm the event uses only synthetic or fully sanitized values.
Confirm the source-of-truth boundary is visible.
Route derived interpretation to human review before escalation.
